# F-FIXTURE-P16-ORPHAN: feature Ready for Merge but missing from tracker Features tables

**Feature:** F-FIXTURE-P16-ORPHAN | **Type:** Frontend-Feature | **Priority:** Medium
**Status:** Ready for Merge | **Branch:** feature/F-FIXTURE-P16-ORPHAN
**Created:** 2026-05-08 | **Dependencies:** None

## Spec

Fixture verifying the v0.18.3 P16 NIT drift recipe. The companion
`fixture-P16-tracker.md` (mocked tracker) has Features tables for
`F-FIXTURE-P16-LISTED` and `F-FIXTURE-OTHER` but NO row for `F-FIXTURE-P16-ORPHAN`.
P16 must flag.

Empirical origin: fx F-WEB-MENU-VISION-001 audit (no row in any Features table,
agent claimed "by design standalone" which was incorrect).
